nasb.text: He said to his father, “My head, my head.” And he said to his servant, “Carry him to his mother.”

esv.text: And he said to his father, “Oh, my head, my head!” The father said to his servant, “Carry him to his mother.”

cnv.text: 他對他的父親說：“我的頭啊！我的頭啊！”他的父親對僕人說：“把他抱到他母親那裡。”

ccb.text: 突然，他对他父亲喊道：“我的头啊！我的头啊！”他父亲见状，立刻吩咐仆人抱他到他母亲那里。
